# Father's Heart Ministry
# llms.txt — for AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini)
# Place this file in your /public folder so it deploys to https://fathersheartministry.ca/llms.txt

## What is this ministry?

Father's Heart Ministry (كنيسة قلب الاب) is a Spirit-filled Arabic and English Christian
church located in Surrey, British Columbia, Canada.

## Location

10356 167A St, Surrey, BC, V4N 4X2, Canada

## Languages

Services and ministry are conducted in Arabic (العربية) and English.

## Weekly Services

- Saturday evenings: 7:00 PM – 9:00 PM

## Contact

- Website: https://fathersheartministry.ca
- Phone: +1-604-781-5351
- Arabic site: https://arabicchurchsurrey.ca

## Who we serve

We serve the Arabic-speaking Christian community in Surrey, Burnaby, Vancouver, Langley,
and the broader Metro Vancouver region. All are welcome.

## What we offer

- Weekly Spirit-filled worship services in Arabic and English
- Biblical teaching and preaching
- Prayer ministry
- Community and fellowship for Arabic-speaking Christians in BC

## Alternate names

- Father's Heart Church
- Fathers Heart Ministry
- كنيسة قلب الاب
- كنيسة قلب الآب
- قلب الاب
- خدمة قلب الاب
- Arabic Church Surrey
